creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
Update to 2.9.0.  Add ICU,THREADS options.  Sort related options and option
handling. Fix WITHOUT_NLS. Fix plist for WITH_DVI_MANUALS.  Partially fix
NOPORTDOCS. Fix build when a threaded Tk is used. Switch to USE_TK.  More
cleanup to follow later.

Prodded by: Wen Heping (who also submitted a patch, independently)

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
